name: In The forest
description:
Bro I found Two pictures I wanted to use The one that is The Pfp is from AppleParty

This is the other one I Wanted to Use by Weirdystar

So I found out about A Naga Yesterday and I felt the Need to Procrastinate ALL of my Projects to make this Bot (And someone asked me to So I am) :) I also Did some resurrecting to help me And not a Lot could Be found to help Make this bot so It might Not be the Best and Most accurate Sorry However I'm mostly trying to Put the Pfp Personalty down.

Alright so this Bot is about You Going out hunting And You then Find a Curious Naga
